Well, one I understand why they cleared all the currency, but I sort of really donвҖҷt understand why they had to clear the cosmetics cause I mean a lot of players worked hard for them so I donвҖҷt see why they did it, but I also sort of do even then I donвҖҷt think itвҖҷs cool that they did it like they couldвҖҷve kept the peoples cosmetics and like removed their currency and I wouldвҖҷve understood but like come on man second off the game got an update in a long while thatвҖҷs pretty good but in my personal opinion, it only added a new mod menu and a couple new shiny cosmetics like yeah, they did a couple other stuff but honestly otherwise from that itвҖҷs epic I really love the game and IвҖҷm glad the devs keep working on it пҝј

Yk I feel bad saying this but this game is actually horrible, it took away all of my cosmetics when I spent money on the game, it took away my lazer maze cosmetic which TOOK ME WEEKS TO GET, AND THEN IT TOOK AWAY MY WAFFLE WHICH TOOK ME EVEN LONGER, SO MAYBE I WILL GIVE THE GAME A BETTER REIVEW IF THEY GET MY COSMETICS BACK!!

developer_response.body: Hi, we recently reset cosmetics do to a new way of getting currency (quests). Because our old system used a way that gives people currency over time, even if they weren't online, players had thousands of currency and when we added new cosmetics, people would be able to get them right away and quests wouldn't be worth it to do. The cosmetics that were reset were not obtainable by spending any money, and they were all given over time.

reviews.review_description:

developer_response.body: Hello, we are sorry for your bad experience. There was text that showed how to get the mod menu, but luckily now, all bugs with mod menus have been fixed and revamped + better menus have been made! You should be able to get your mod menu back just by playing the game. Please consider changing your review as we try our hardest to create a fun game with public mods for people to use. We spent a long time fixing that bug and making the mod menu even better for everyone. Thank you!
